# P-G-001 — Backdated document

> Document antidaté

## Description (EN)

Document metadata creation date is after the document's stated effective date.

## Description (FR)

La date de création des métadonnées est postérieure à la date effective déclarée par le document.

<!-- END auto-generated -->

## Detection logic

Backdated document — PDF info-dict creation_date or mod_date is significantly after the document's alleged effective date. Detected via PDF metadata extraction.

## Likelihood-ratio reasoning

Direct evidence of document fabrication after-the-fact. Default prior 0.30 + weight 0.85.

## Known false-positive traps

- **Re-saved PDFs** that updated the modification date without altering content.
- **PDF generation by a workflow tool** that stamps the current date as creation_date even for old content.

## Production wiring

Requires Stage 3 PDF metadata extractor (worker-document) to populate `event.payload.document_metadata`.
